title: Official Cover Art Pictures And Wallpapers
display_title: Official Cover Art Pictures And Wallpapers
wikitext:
[]: Official Cover Art Pictures And Wallpapers?             Quote Post by Crystalline » Tue Jun 02, 2015 10:43 am I store all posters/cover art/wallpapers that are official (a.k.a represent the piece of media) from movies, games, anime series, etc... but finding official artwork, or at least that one piece of artwork for an anime series has proven to be quite stressful. I usually check here: http://myanimelist.net/ but most of the times, other anime series related websites have different pictures for every series, so I'm left wondering which one is THE one. You know, just like major hollywood movies have THE poster (or more than one) anime series have those as well (at least I think they do). Do you guys know where I can find both the cover art (poster-styled image) and any official wallpapers for Evangelion? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 02, 2015 3:00 pm For the LDs, video tapes, etc, you can find them for NGE and the New Movies here: http://svenge.pcriot.com/ The artbook Die Sterne (original and version 2.0) has what you're looking for, too. Hope that helps as a start!

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue Jun 02, 2015 3:16 pm The Evastore typically posts wallpapers for desktop and iPhone on a monthly basis, but doesn't have any this month.

[]: Official Cover Art Pictures And Wallpapers?             Quote Post by Crystalline » Tue Jun 02, 2015 10:43 am I store all posters/cover art/wallpapers that are official (a.k.a represent the piece of media) from movies, games, anime series, etc... but finding official artwork, or at least that one piece of artwork for an anime series has proven to be quite stressful. I usually check here: http://myanimelist.net/ but most of the times, other anime series related websites have different pictures for every series, so I'm left wondering which one is THE one. You know, just like major hollywood movies have THE poster (or more than one) anime series have those as well (at least I think they do). Do you guys know where I can find both the cover art (poster-styled image) and any official wallpapers for Evangelion? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 02, 2015 3:00 pm For the LDs, video tapes, etc, you can find them for NGE and the New Movies here: http://svenge.pcriot.com/ The artbook Die Sterne (original and version 2.0) has what you're looking for, too. Hope that helps as a start!
